ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate Set For 8/17/22.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cross appeared by zoom for and with Megan Bovis (administrator) by zoom.

The court noted that it has been continuing the status hearing to accommodate the sale of the real property as well as the spousal property petition, and questions whether Mrs. Bovis has filed election of surviving spouse under Probate Code 13502. Mr. Cross stated that he thinks they overlooked that and that he can correct it very quickly, and that the order on the spousal property petition has been entered. Mr. Cross also stated that they just received a draft of the accounting, and that he hopes to have it ready very shortly and have it filed. Status on close of estate is continued to June 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cross, via Zoom, for Megan Bovis, Personal Representative.

The court advises that it intends to modify the proposed order submitted to the court to clarify that the net proceeds from the sale of the estate's real property shall be confirmed. Counsel agrees with the court's tentative ruling.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2426 24th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cross, via Zoom, for and with Megan Bovis, Personal Representative.

The sale was confirmed at $1,305,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,240,00 is required.

Mr. Cross mentions the ex parte application to increase Administrator's bond and the proposed order on the report of sale which are pending in the court's e-filing queue. Mr. Cross offers to leave the orders on the ex parte application and report of sale with the court. The court accepts the preceding.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
